title: Muttamorphosis
overview: Spot is jealous of Leonard's daily journey to school, so he pretends to be a boy and goes to school

title: Pet Project
overview: Leonard and Scott have to bring their pets to school, but Scott doesn't have a pet: he is a pet.

title: Movin' on Pup
overview: Scott is promoted to 5th grade and has to leave Leonard behind.

title: Escaping Dog Trick
overview: A new security fence threatens Scott's ability to go to school.

title: A Lick is Still a Kiss
overview: No one can figure out how Leonard knows what Leslie's lipstick tastes like. Spot knows.

title: Being Mrs. Leadready
overview: Spot needs someone to play his mother at parent-teacher conference night.

title: Let Sleep-Over Dogs Lie
overview: Scott and Leonard go to their first sleep-over.

title: Costume Pity Party
overview: Leonard doesn't want to wear a costume because some bully picked on him a year ago that Halloween.  After telling that story, Mr. Jolly starts to cry too much that he ends up dehydrating himself!

title: Scott's Honor
overview: Scott joins the Junior Boy Rangers.

title: Fifi
overview: Scott falls in love with a circus dog.

title: Bad to the Bone
overview: After Scott gets in trouble on a field trip, he decides to be bad forever.

title: Always Knock the Postman Twice
overview: Scott can't control his hatred of mailmen.

title: You Can't Bite City Hall
overview: The city wants to turn the dog park into a skateboard park and Scott can't decide which side he's on.

title: A Dog for All Seasons
overview: Mrs. Helperman has to rewrite the Christmas play overnight. Spot searches for his Christmas heritage.

title: Tallulahpalooza
overview: Principal Strickler's cat stays with the Leadreadys and disrupts Leonard and Scott's plans for laser tag and pizza.

title: Saving Mr. Jolly
overview: Pretty Boy and Mr. Jolly both think the other is missing so they go to school in search of Leonard's help

title: Rule of Paw
overview: Scott takes his new role as playground safety monitor a bit too seriously.

title: Never Take Candy from a Kindergartner
overview: A kindergartener has a crush on Leonard.  Pretty Boy and Mr. Jolly complete to give up bad habits.

title: A Few Good Boys
overview: Leonard and Scott hate their new Junior Boy Ranger assignments: Leonard has to spend the day with senior citizens and Scott has to look after cats.  Meanwhile, Mr. Jolly and Pretty Boy are fed up with reruns and turn to the internet.

title: Bad Fur Day
overview: Scott and Leonard both get haircuts and worry about their appearance in school the next day.  Mr. Jolly writes a fan letter to a model.

title: The Tale of the Telltale Taffy
overview: Leonard goes trick-or-treating against his mother's wishes.  Mr. Jolly and Pretty Boy suspect a stray cat of being a vampire.

title: Don't Count Your Chickies Before They Hatch
overview: Scott is thrilled at a chance to go the upcoming air show.  But it conflicts with his class assignment to watch over chicken eggs.

title: Strickler's Pet
overview: Strickler employs Scott as his special assistant so that he can avoid him from reading 20,000 books.

title: Fresh 'n' Frozey Chocolaccino
overview: Scott and Leonard create a brand new drink so that they can raise money to buy a scooter.

title: The Grass Seed is Always Greener...
overview: Pretty Boy migrates down south, and Scott and Leonard go looking for him.

title: No Substitutions, Please
overview: Everyone in the class is excited when a substitute teacher takes over ... except Scott.

title: Don't It Make My Brown Eyes Green
overview: Scott gets jealous of Leonard's new popular game.

title: Party Animal
overview: Spot organizes a birthday party for Leonard against his wishes.

title: Mr. Jolly: Man ...or Mouser?
overview: Leonard bets his mom that Mr. Jolly can catch a mouse.

title: What Does Sweat Have to Do with It?
overview: It's time for the fourth grade class to go square dancing. When Leonard is paired up with the gal-of-his dreams, Leslie, he's afraid she won't want to dance with him because of his sweaty hands.  Meanwhile, Mr. Jolly isn't as jolly as he used to be ... since he's lactose intolerant!

title: DogFight
overview: Leonard can't play basketball very well, so Scott teaches him.   The two are then challenged by 2 fifth graders to a two-on-two   game. After being congratulated, Scott and Leonard have an    argument on a bad pass. Then they are told to fight each other.   But Scott has a plan...

title: Taint Valentine's Day
overview: Spot plays Cupid for Scott while Mr. Jolly plays Cyrano for Pretty Boy.

title: Science Not Fair
overview: Scott's science project gets mistaken as Leonard's.

title: To Bee or Not to Bee
overview: Scott becomes the school's spelling bee champ. Pretty Boy teaches Mr. Jolly how to sing.

title: One Dog's Junk
overview: Spots chew toy is accidently sold at a yard sale and it gets in the hands of Ian.

title: Team Scott
overview: The East Westland JBR Troops let Scott compete and win in all the JBR Confab events all by himself so they don't lose for the 10th year in a row.

title: Take Me Out of the Ballgame
overview: Leonard and Scott are trying out for baseball season. When Scott    realises he can't join the team, he decides to teach Leonard the game.

title: Inspector Leadready II
overview: When Leonard is accused of breaking Leslie's map, Leonard and    Scott work together to find the culprit.

title: The Turkey That Came to Dinner
overview: Leonard's granny visits but she's brought a live turkey that tries to befriend the pets.

title: Double Dog Dare
overview: In a Truth or Dare game, Leonard is dared to tell everyone who his favorite girl in the class is. If he admits that it's Leslie then everybody might laugh at him and it'll ruin him and Leslie's friendship and if he lies and says he has a crush on Younghee, then he might break Leslie's heart, so he decides to try a super hard dare in place of telling the truth.

title: Attack of the 50 Inch Girl
overview: A new girl comes to school and torments Spot.

title: The Flipper
overview: After Scott teaches Leonard, he becomes the Flipper when he becomes an expert at flipping cards into a circle. But after a bit of tension between the two, they have a final showdown. In the meantime, Mr. Jolly makes buildings out of cards as Pretty Boy does various methods to blow it down.

title: The Blight Before Christmas
overview: While Leonard hopes to get a Mach III Game Command for Christmas, Spot searches for a lost dog hoping to collect a $500.00 reward to buy stuff for himself.

title: All About Eavesdropping
overview: Leornard and Scott entertain at a girl's party and end up listening to a secret conversation.

title: The Nose Knows
overview: Scott realizes that the Thursday Surprise is dog food.

title: Don't Bite the Hound That Feeds You
overview: Spot gets fleas who talk in a French accent.

title: A Breed Apart
overview: Spot visits the dog show to discover his breeding.  Mr. Jolly's father visits, but Mr. Jolly doesn't want to see him.
